ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_key" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_key" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., O for open, F for finished) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "order_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the order */,
  "clerk" TEXT /* Identifier for the clerk handling the order */,
  "ship_priority" INTEGER /* Shipping priority of the order */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments associated with the order */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the order was placed */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_priority FOREIGN KEY ("order_priority") REFERENCES order_priority ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_ship_priority FOREIGN KEY ("ship_priority") REFERENCES shipping_info ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_clerk FOREIGN KEY ("clerk") REFERENCES clerk_info ("clerk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_status FOREIGN KEY ("order_status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clerk_info" (
  "clerk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clerk */,
  "clerk_name" TEXT /* Full name of the clerk */,
  "clerk_email" TEXT /* Email address of the clerk */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the clerk */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the clerk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clerk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the order status (e.g., Open, Finished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_priority" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_description" TEXT /* Description of the order priority level (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_info" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping priority */,
  "shipping_description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping priority (e.g., Urgent, Standard) */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "order_key" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., order status update, customer query) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_comments_order_key FOREIGN KEY ("order_key") REFERENCES orders ("order_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "order_key" INTEGER /* ID of the order being updated */,
  "old_status" TEXT /* Old status of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status change occurred */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the clerk who updated the order status */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_histories_order_key FOREIGN KEY ("order_key") REFERENCES orders ("order_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_histories_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES clerk_info ("clerk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_key" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_payments_order_key FOREIGN KEY ("order_key") REFERENCES orders ("order_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_key" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., Processing, Completed) */,
  "return_reason_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the return reason */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the clerk who resolved the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_returns_order_key FOREIGN KEY ("order_key") REFERENCES orders ("order_key"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_returns_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES clerk_info ("clerk_id")
)
